title: Flexibility of boards connected in automation subitems
excerpt: When I have more than one mirror column for subitens, once the boards are connect, I cannot make changes in automations configuration. To do that I have to disconnect all boards, make the configurations and then connect …

posts.author: felipemoncalvo (Felipe Moncalvo)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I have more than one mirror column for subitens, once the boards are connect, I cannot make changes in automations configuration. To do that I have to disconnect all boards, make the configurations and then connect all the boards again. It’s a lot of effort considering de high quantity of board we use connected. We also have the problem of disconecting all tasks mirrors if there is the need of changing an automation.

We would like the development of a feature that make more flexible the management of these kind of automation.
